note: KNOWN GAP (defense-in-depth): LeadContext.budget has no ge=0 constraint (unlike the API's LeadCreateRequest, which DOES reject negative budgets with 422 — see the 'negative_budget_rejected' API-level case). If any future caller builds a LeadContext directly without going through the API schema, a negative budget is silently accepted.
